# Architecture

> Generated by `/module-boundaries` on 2026-03-20.  Re-run any time to refresh.

---

## Domain Map

This project is organised into **4 top-level domain packages** plus an extended
set of helper modules that live at the root of `harness_skills/`.

---

### 1 · `harness_skills` — Core Framework

The main framework package.  The root `__init__.py` is intentionally **empty**
(`__all__ = []`); all public symbols are owned by the sub-packages below.

| Sub-package | Public surface (`__all__`) | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `harness_skills.models` | `Status`, `Severity`, `GateResult`, `Violation`, `HarnessResponse`, `CreateResponse`, `EvaluateResponse`, `LintResponse`, `LogEntry`, `ObserveResponse`, `StalePlanResponse`, `StatusDashboardResponse`, `TelemetryReport`, `UpdateResponse`, `CoverageGateConfig`, … | Shared Pydantic response models — foundation layer, no local dependencies |
| `harness_skills.gates` | `CoverageGate`, `DocsFreshnessGate`, `DocsGateConfig`, `GateEvaluator`, `GateFailure`, `GateOutcome`, `EvaluationSummary`, `HarnessConfigLoader`, `run_gates` | Built-in evaluation gate runners; reads `harness.config.yaml` via `HarnessConfigLoader` |
| `harness_skills.generators` | `EvaluationReport`, `GateFailure`, `GateId`, `GateResult`, `GateStatus`, `Severity`, `run_all_gates` | Artifact generators (evaluation, config generation) |
| `harness_skills.plugins` | `PluginGateConfig`, `PluginGateRunner`, `load_plugin_gates`, `run_plugin_gates` | Custom evaluation gate plugin system (YAML-driven, no Python required) |
| `harness_skills.cli` | `cli`, `PipelineGroup` | `harness` CLI entry point (create / evaluate / lint / observe / status / telemetry) |
| `harness_skills.utils` | *(empty — internal helpers only)* | Shared utility helpers; no public API yet |

**Top-level helper modules** (single-file, not sub-packages):

| Module | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `harness_skills.handoff` | Agent handoff protocol — `HandoffDocument`, `HandoffProtocol`, `SearchHints` |
| `harness_skills.resume` | Agent resume orchestration — `load_plan_state`, `resume_agent_options` |
| `harness_skills.task_lock` | Cross-process task locking — `TaskLock`, `TaskLockProtocol` |
| `harness_skills.boot` | Agent boot & sandbox isolation — `BootConfig`, `IsolationConfig`, `boot_instance` |
| `harness_skills.logging_config` | **Logging provider** — `configure`, `get_logger`, `set_trace_id` |
| `harness_skills.stale_plan_detector` | Stale plan detection — `detect_stale_plan`, `PlanTask` |
| `harness_skills.telemetry_reporter` | Telemetry aggregation CLI command |
| `harness_skills.error_aggregation` | Error log query and aggregation |
| `harness_skills.error_query_agent` | LLM-powered error analysis — `build_error_tools`, `run_error_query` |
| `harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill` | DOM snapshot façade — delegates to `dom_snapshot_utility` |
| `harness_skills.performance_hooks` | Performance tracking — `PerformanceTracker` |
| `harness_skills.pr_effectiveness` | PR effectiveness metrics — `ArtifactType`, `PRRecord` |
| `harness_skills.effectiveness_stats` | Effectiveness statistics aggregation |

---

### 2 · `dom_snapshot_utility` — Browser-Free DOM Inspection

Standalone package.  No dependencies on other local packages.

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `DOMSnapshot`, `PageMeta`, `Heading`, `Link`, `Button`, `InputField`, `Form`, `AriaRegion`, `TableSnapshot`, `ImageSnapshot` | Structured DOM snapshot models |
| `snapshot_from_html`, `snapshot_from_url`, `snapshot_to_text` | Public API functions |

Used by `harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill` as a façade layer.

---

### 3 · `harness_dashboard` — Effectiveness Scoring & Dashboard

Self-contained package.  Internal modules: `models`, `scorer`, `dashboard`, `data_generator`.

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `compute_scores` | Score a list of `HarnessRecord` objects |
| `render_dashboard` | Render the Rich terminal dashboard |
| `generate_dataset` | Generate a synthetic dataset for testing / demos |
| `ArtifactType`, `HarnessRecord`, `PRRecord` | Domain models |

No dependencies on other local packages.

---

### 4 · `log_format_linter` — Structured-Log Linter

Standalone package.  Internal modules: `checker`, `detector`, `generator`, `models`, `cli`.

| Symbol | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `generate_rules` | Generate per-framework linter rules |
| `detect_framework` | Detect the logging framework in use |
| `check_file`, `check_directory` | Scan source files for log violations |
| `Language`, `LogFramework`, `LogLinterConfig`, `LogViolation`, `ViolationSeverity`, `GeneratorResult` | Domain models |

---

## Dependency Graph

```
harness_skills
├── models          ◄── (foundation layer; no local deps)
│   └── base, create, evaluate, lint, observe, stale,
│       status, telemetry, update, gate_configs
│
├── plugins ──────► models
│   └── gate_plugin, loader, runner
│
├── gates ─────────► models
│   │             ► plugins
│   └── coverage, docs_freshness, runner
│
├── generators ───► models
│   └── evaluation, config_generator
│
├── cli ──────────► models
│   │             ► generators
│   └── create, evaluate, observe, status, main
│
└── utils           (internal helpers, no public API)

harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill ──────► dom_snapshot_utility
harness_skills.effectiveness_stats ─────► harness_skills.pr_effectiveness

skills/ (agent skill scripts)
├── context-handoff  ──► harness_skills.handoff
├── write_handoff    ──► harness_skills.handoff
├── harness-resume   ──► harness_skills.resume
├── dom-snapshot     ──► harness_skills.dom_snapshot_skill
└── error-aggregation──► harness_skills.error_aggregation
                      ──► harness_skills.error_query_agent

Top-level orchestration scripts
├── coordinate.py        ──► harness_skills.task_lock
├── task_lock.py         ──► harness_skills.task_lock  (re-export shim)
├── harness_status.py    ──► harness_skills.handoff
├── harness_telemetry.py ──► harness_skills (CLI / models)
└── harness_context.py   ──► harness_skills (context helpers)

Standalone (no local deps)
├── dom_snapshot_utility
├── harness_dashboard
└── log_format_linter
```

---

## Module Boundary Analysis

> All 10 domain packages have `__all__` declared — all boundaries are **EXPLICIT**.

```
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  Domain                      Init file      API surface    Violations
  ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  dom_snapshot_utility        __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    1
  harness_dashboard           __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    5
  harness_skills (root)       __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    0
  harness_skills/cli          __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    1 (private)
  harness_skills/gates        __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    5
  harness_skills/generators   __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    3
  harness_skills/models       __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    17
  harness_skills/plugins      __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    6
  harness_skills/utils        __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    0
  log_format_linter           __init__.py    ✅ EXPLICIT    1
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  10 domains   39 total violations   0 domains need __all__
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

### Open Violations

**dom_snapshot_utility** (1):
- `tests/test_dom_snapshot.py:24` → `from dom_snapshot_utility.snapshot import …`
  *(fix: `from dom_snapshot_utility import DOMSnapshot, snapshot_from_html, …`)*

**harness_dashboard** (5):
- `tests/test_scorer.py:18` → `from harness_dashboard.models import …`
- `tests/test_scorer.py:24` → `from harness_dashboard.scorer import compute_scores`
- `tests/test_scorer.py:102` → `from harness_dashboard.scorer import _tier, EffectivenessTier` ⚠️ private symbol
- `tests/test_data_generator.py:19` → `from harness_dashboard.data_generator import generate_dataset`
- `tests/test_data_generator.py:20` → `from harness_dashboard.models import ArtifactType, HarnessRecord, PRRecord`
  *(fix: `from harness_dashboard import compute_scores, generate_dataset, ArtifactType, …`)*

**log_format_linter** (1):
- `tests/test_log_format_linter.py:25` → `from log_format_linter.cli import main as cli_main`
  *(fix: expose `main` in `log_format_linter/__init__.py`, then `from log_format_linter import main as cli_main`)*

**harness_skills/generators** (3):
- `harness_skills/cli/evaluate.py:40` → `from harness_skills.generators.evaluation import …`
- `harness_skills/cli/create.py:40` → `from harness_skills.generators.config_generator import …`
- `tests/test_generators/test_evaluation.py:20` → `from harness_skills.generators.evaluation import …`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.generators import …`)*

**harness_skills/models** (17 across production + tests):

*Production code:*
- `harness_skills/stale_plan_detector.py:52,53` → `.models.base`, `.models.stale`
- `harness_skills/telemetry_reporter.py:36,37` → `.models.base`, `.models.telemetry`
- `harness_skills/cli/status.py:56,57` → `.models.base`, `.models.status`
- `harness_skills/cli/observe.py:62` → `.models.observe`
- `harness_skills/plugins/gate_plugin.py:9` → `.models.base`
- `harness_skills/plugins/runner.py:4` → `.models.base`
- `harness_skills/gates/coverage.py:57` → `.models.gate_configs`
- `harness_skills/gates/runner.py:68,82` → `.models.gate_configs`, `.models.base`
- `harness_skills/generators/config_generator.py:31` → `.models.gate_configs`

*Tests:*
- `tests/test_stale_plan_detector.py:12` → `.models.base`
- `tests/plugins/test_integration.py:11,12` → `.models.base`, `.models.evaluate`
- `tests/gates/test_coverage.py:40` → `.models.gate_configs`
- `tests/plugins/test_runner.py:10,136,150` → `.models.base`
- `tests/plugins/test_gate_plugin.py:11` → `.models.base`
- `tests/test_models/test_observe.py:24` → `.models.observe`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.models import Status, GateResult, …` throughout)*

**harness_skills/plugins** (6):
- `harness_skills/gates/runner.py:83,84` → `.plugins.loader`, `.plugins.runner`
- `tests/plugins/test_integration.py:13,14` → `.plugins.loader`, `.plugins.runner`
- `tests/plugins/test_runner.py:11,12` → `.plugins.gate_plugin`, `.plugins.runner` (+ private `_record_telemetry`) ⚠️
- `tests/plugins/test_gate_plugin.py:12` → `.plugins.gate_plugin`
- `tests/plugins/test_loader.py:9,10` → `.plugins.gate_plugin`, `.plugins.loader`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.plugins import PluginGateConfig, load_plugin_gates, …`)*

**harness_skills/gates** (3, all in tests):
- `tests/gates/test_coverage.py:30` → `.gates.coverage` (+ private symbols)
- `tests/gates/test_docs_freshness.py:6` → `.gates.docs_freshness` (+ private symbols) ⚠️
- `tests/gates/test_runner_plugin_integration.py:20` → `.gates.runner`
  *(fix: use `from harness_skills.gates import CoverageGate, GateEvaluator, run_gates, …`)*

**harness_skills/cli** (1 — private symbol):
- `tests/test_models/test_observe.py:232` → `from harness_skills.cli.observe import _emit` ⚠️ private
  *(fix: refactor test to exercise the public interface only)*

> ⚠️ = private symbol (leading `_`) imported across a boundary — always forbidden regardless of `__all__`.

---

## Enforcement

Boundary rules are encoded as **blocking** principles `MB001`–`MB014` in
`.claude/principles.yaml` and are automatically enforced by:

- `/check-code` — scans staged files against all `MB*` principles
- `/review-pr`  — flags deep imports and private-symbol leaks in PR diffs

Re-run `/module-boundaries` at any time to refresh this document and update principles.
